# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:24.000
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and a small plane flying, introducing the collaboration between Microsoft Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI. It then transitions to an interview with a man discussing the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include sound waveforms representing audio data and shots of a data center, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

It then transitions to an interview with a man discussing the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays representing the TTS process. The interview continues with another man elaborating on the high fidelity and human-like quality of cognitive services' voice offerings. The video then shifts to various shots of expansive data centers and server rooms, highlighting the infrastructure behind the technology. Following this, the scene changes to vibrant aerial views of landscapes and a castle, showcasing the realistic graphics of the flight simulator. The video concludes with detailed shots of an Airbus airplane on the tarmac, ground crew directing the plane, and the Microsoft logo, emphasizing the integration of AI and simulation technology.
